name: Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 cups mozzarella cheese, shredded and divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Cook ground beef in a large skillet over medium heat for 4 to 6 minutes or until no longer pink, stirring occasionally to break up into pea-size pieces. Drain off drippings.
3. Add spaghetti sauce and tomatoes with liquid to the skillet, stirring to combine; set aside.
4. In a bowl, mix ricotta cheese, beaten egg, Parmesan cheese, and basil.
5. Spread 2 cups of beef mixture over the bottom of an 11 3/4 x 7 1/2-inch baking dish.
6. Arrange 3 lasagna noodles in a single layer, pressing lightly into the beef mixture.
7. Spoon ricotta cheese mixture on top of the noodles and sprinkle with 1 cup mozzarella cheese.
8. Top with additional 2 cups of beef mixture; arrange remaining noodles in a single layer, pressing lightly into the beef mixture.
9. Top with the remaining beef mixture, spreading evenly to cover the noodles.
10. Bake in a moderate oven at 375 degrees F for 45 minutes or until noodles are fork tender.
11. Sprinkle the remaining 1 cup mozzarella cheese on top; cover loosely with aluminum foil.
12. Let stand for at least 15 minutes before serving.
